intent: Execute a tip reracking procedure using a P300 multi-channel pipette to transfer tips from three source tip racks (slots 3, 6, and 9) to designated positions in the destination tip rack (slot 5). Pick up tips from row A of each source rack and deposit them in alternating columns of the destination rack at positions corresponding to rows C, E, and G. Perform an initial 20µL ghost aspiration/dispense cycle at the trash container for the first tip transfer.
